name: NAD/redox review supports multi-axis mechanism but not efficacy claims
summary: Review proposing an integrated NAD, mitochondrial quality-control, and redox-stability framework around NMN/NR, PQQ, and ergothioneine, emphasizing mechanistic coupling and need for future clinical research.
statement: Review proposing an integrated NAD, mitochondrial quality-control, and redox-stability framework around NMN/NR, PQQ, and ergothioneine, emphasizing mechanistic coupling and need for future clinical research.
population_or_model: Review-level synthesis across NAD, redox, supplementation, or vascular-aging literature
caveats: Review context should not be treated as new primary efficacy evidence.
The record supports boundary and source-completeness assessment rather than stage upgrade.
